reasoning: Component library has no backend/data/infra — only needs scout + architect (config) + frontend (components)
outcome: successful — 3 agents covered all domains efficiently

reasoning: Split by category for parallelism (3 frontend by category + core for hooks/barrel + infra for CI)

outcome: successful — 72 files modified, 0 conflicts between agents. 2 agents left stale default exports (minor).

reasoning: grep found 0 imports from nutui in src/ — packages completely unused

context: GitHub Packages requires scope matching org name
reasoning: GitHub Packages mandates @org/name scope. Org is ansoragroup.
owner_stated_reason: agreed to GitHub Packages which requires this

reasoning: 75+ hardcoded strings across 20+ components. Props-only would add ~5 props per component. Context with prop override matches existing useControllableState philosophy.
owner_stated_reason: Owner requested multi-language and multi-currency support
outcome: successful — 23 components migrated, 0 breaking changes, works without provider

reasoning: Intl.NumberFormat with style:'currency' produces inconsistent UZS output across browsers. Using grouping-only mode + manual symbol placement preserves current behavior.

context: Where to place Storybook documentation pages
reasoning: src/docs/ keeps docs separate from component stories, covered by existing Storybook glob, not included in npm build
owner_stated_reason: Owner requested design system documentation in Storybook
outcome: successful — 7 pages created, sidebar groups work

reasoning: Each agent owns exclusive directories. Split by domain: form, commerce, feedback/data-display, pages, docs, auth. Zero conflict risk.
owner_stated_reason: Owner wanted comprehensive execution, all P0+P1 at once
outcome: successful — 160 files, 469 tests, 0 conflicts. 1 import path error fixed.

context: Theme presets not working because components used SCSS vars
reasoning: $color-primary compiles to hardcoded #FF5000. CSS custom properties are runtime-changeable.
owner_stated_reason: Owner reported theme switcher doesn't work
outcome: successful — 38 files migrated, all themes work at runtime

context: Themes only changed primary color, price/success/etc stayed default
reasoning: Partial theming looks broken. Each preset needs harmonized palette across all 16 semantic colors.
